'''Nara Deega''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]] and the [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil Sector]] c. [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] and was replaced by [[E'noro]]. He was named to the [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Senate Defense Council]] after replacing [[Tig Peramis]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
It is possible that Deega was the unnamed Bith senator that was sent on a diplomatic mission to the [[Roche system]] in ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
